goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'university arms hotel'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking' and 'price range'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'cantonese' food and should be in the 'centre'.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'north american' food.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called university arms hotel
Make sure you get whether they have free parking and price range
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve cantonese food and should be in the centre
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves north american food
Make sure you get phone number
